meta.description: View on %s, an alternative private front-end to Reddit.
banner.offline: You are viewing a local offline backup. Live data is currently unavailable.
modal.leave_title: You are about to leave this site
search.placeholder: Search — type r for rating, s for sub, t for type… ⇥ to accept
search.hint: Inline autocomplete: type a letter, press Tab/→ to accept. Keys: sub rating type author flair sort mode date after before score ups comments cached.
search.mode_cloud: Live Reddit · click for local archive
search.mode_local: Local archive · click for live Reddit
search.mode_locked: Local archive only · upstream disabled by operator
listing.all_nsfw: All posts are hidden because they are NSFW. Enable "Show NSFW posts" in settings to view.
listing.all_filtered: (All content on this page has been filtered)
listing.miss_hint: No posts here matched your filters — keep loading to search further back.
media.long_video_hint: Video %d min — click to start download
post.repost_badge_title: Same content surfaced more times — variants listed below
post.repost_variants_summary: %d variants of this content (click to expand / collapse)
post.no_tokens_alert: No session tokens available on this instance
post.time_machine_title: Removed upstream — served from local archive
post.time_machine_notice: Time Machine — this post was removed upstream and is served from RedMemo's local archive.
loadmore.label: Load More
loadmore.quota: Quota temporarily unavailable — try again later.
empty.no_posts_month: Try searching for something? No posts this month.
empty.reddit_blocked: Oops... Reddit blocked us. So, reddit, fuck you!
archive.no_posts: No archived posts for this subreddit.
archive.nsfw_body: There are posts here, but they are all hidden by your NSFW filter.
archive.nsfw_hint_post: and enable "Show NSFW posts" to view them.
archive_hub.empty_min: No archived subreddits with more than %v posts yet.
archive_hub.dead_tag: · Banned on Reddit (local archive still readable)
archive_hub.dead_title: Banned on Reddit (local archive still readable)
archive_search.placeholder: Search posts, or type a subreddit to filter
archive_search.no_results: No archived posts match your search.
settings.bypass_warn: REDMEMO_AUTH_BYPASS is on — the TOTP gate is OFF and anyone with network reach can change instance settings. Only acceptable on a trusted homelab behind an outer auth layer.
settings.archive_control_title: Whitelist with '+' (e.g. cats+dogs) keeps only those; blacklist with '-' (e.g. -spam-meta) keeps everything except those. Any '+' makes every '-' ignored. Duplicate names are dropped entirely. Empty = archive everything.
settings.show_local_nsfw_subs: Show NSFW subs in archive nav
settings.lazy_media_title: When on, images and videos in online post listings are only requested once the post scrolls near the viewport, instead of all at once.
settings.show_all_gallery_media_title: When on, gallery posts in listing pages show all media items inline with navigation arrows, instead of only the first image.
settings.video_quality_title: Preferred maximum resolution for Reddit-hosted (v.redd.it) videos. Reddit serves each video as a fixed ladder of renditions; this picks the highest rendition at or below the chosen height. Source keeps the original (best) quality. A height above the source's own maximum is ignored.
settings.mute_all_videos_title: Start every video muted. You can still unmute with the player's own controls.
settings.mute_nsfw_videos_title: Start videos on NSFW posts muted. Ignored when "Mute all videos" is on.
settings.long_video_threshold_title: Videos longer than this (in minutes) show a click-to-download placeholder instead of auto-loading. Set to 0 to disable the gate.
settings.disable_visit_confirm: Do not confirm before visiting content on Reddit
settings.fetch_sub_about: Fetch sub about info on visit
settings.fetch_sub_about_title: When on, visiting a subreddit page actively fetches the sub's about info (icon, description) upstream on cache miss/expiry and persists it for 60 days. Off (default) relies only on cached/background-prefetched data.
settings.filter_placeholder: Homepage query, e.g. sub:cats+dogs-meta ups>100 type:image
settings.homepage_skip_hint: This query is empty or only symbols — the homepage is skipped and visitors land on the archive. Add at least one subreddit or search term to enable it.
settings.prefetch_skip_hint: This list is empty or only symbols — background prefetch stays idle. Add at least one subreddit to enable it.
settings.np_sub_modes_title: Override the default sort/timeframe/depth for specific subs. Grammar mirrors the navbar search: sub=key:value pairs joined by &, multiple subs joined by +. Recognised keys: sort (hot/new/top/rising/controversial), time (hour/day/week/month/year/all), depth (none/l2/l3/l2+l3). Unrecognised pieces are silently dropped. Example: golang=sort:rising&time:day&depth:l2+l3+rust=depth:none
settings.np_unified: Subs to prefetch (with optional per-sub overrides)
settings.np_unified_title: One field, one '+'-separated stream. Each clause is either a bare subreddit name (cats) or a per-sub override clause (cats=sort:rising&time:day&depth:l2+l3). Recognised override keys: sort (hot/new/top/rising/controversial), time (hour/day/week/month/year/all), depth (none/l2/l3/l2+l3). Override clauses take precedence over the global defaults above. Picking a suggestion appends a bare entry; type '=k:v' after a name to attach an override.
settings.np_default_depth_title: Global NP depth for every crawled sub. "None" runs L1 listings only — no media, no comments. "L2" adds media downloads. "L3" adds the comment fetch step without media. "L2+L3" runs the full visit-like flow (default for local LAN deployments). Per-sub overrides may set depth:none|l2|l3|l2+l3 in the prefetch box below to deviate for one sub — e.g. with default "none" you can opt in for r/golang with `golang=depth:l2+l3&sort:top`.
settings.np_l3_min_comments_title: Posts with fewer than this many comments are frozen out of L3 (both standalone and bound). 0 disables the filter. The comment count is read from the locally-archived post JSON — no upstream probe is issued. Combined with the cycle-freeze (a post fetched in cycle N is skipped in cycle N+1 regardless of count), this lets the operator say "don't waste budget archiving 1-comment threads" while still letting hot threads through.
settings.disable_upstream_title: When on, every user action that would spend session token quota is served from the local archive only — no active query is sent upstream. CDN media requests still flow (subject to the global rate limit). Use this on public deployments to keep your IP from being blacklisted by sudden bursts of upstream traffic.
settings.token_ttl_title: How long a successful TOTP unlock keeps /settings open before it re-prompts. The cookie is HttpOnly, single-IP, and not extended on activity — a longer window trades shorter re-auth friction for a longer attack surface if the device is stolen. Capped at 60 minutes.
settings.page_limit_title: How many posts each /r/{sub} or /search request fetches from Reddit. Reddit's OAuth quota counts requests, not items, so a larger page costs the same as a small one and burns less quota per post you actually see. Range 5-100, default 50.
settings.confirm_continue: Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.debug_modal_body: Enabling this on a public network may expose instance diagnostics and private information.
settings.upstream_warn: initiative upstream access is enabled. On a public deployment this may rapidly exhaust your Reddit session-token quota and get your IP blacklisted upstream.
settings.upstream_modal_body: Turning this protection off lets user actions reach Reddit directly. On a public deployment, sudden bursts of upstream traffic can exhaust your session-token quota in minutes and cause Reddit to blacklist this instance's IP.
error.title: Error: %s
error.event_log: Prefetch Event Log (%v entries, newest first)
error.cleanup_log: Cleanup Event Log (%v entries, newest first)
fr.upstream_disabled: Initiative upstream access is disabled by the operator: only locally archived content is served. CDN media still flows under the global rate limit.
fr.quota_exhausted: Reddit OAuth quota fully exhausted: too many upstream requests within the past 10 minutes.
fr.hr_l1: HR rate limit L1 triggered: too many upstream requests within the past 5 seconds.
fr.hr_l2: HR rate limit L2 triggered: too many upstream requests within the past 30 seconds.
fr.hr_l3: HR rate limit L3 triggered: too many upstream requests within the past 5 minutes.
fr.hr_redis_down: HR rate-limit store (Redis) is unreachable: blocking upstream traffic and retrying with backoff until it recovers.
fr.totp_replay: Warning — your TOTP secret may have been compromised. You are the second person to submit this correct code within the same 30-second window. The token was NOT issued. Rotate the secret immediately (redmemo --reset-totp).
fr.auth_locked: Three wrong TOTP codes — this round is locked until the next 30-second window. Wait for your authenticator to roll over and try again.
fr.unsafe_env: You declined to confirm the environment is safe. The /settings gate will not proceed until you re-enter from a trusted screen.
fr.congrats: Congrats — Reddit hasn't sanctioned you yet… or has it?
fr.internal_error: Something went wrong serving this page. The local archive may not have this content yet — you can still try Reddit directly.
